subcodes.first_line: O Judah! God willing, mayest thou be confirmed in that which leadeth to the exaltation of the Word of God. The station of this Day is the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یهودا انشاء الله موید باشی بر آنچه سبب ارتفاع کلمه الله است مقام یوم مقام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
